author: Copilot
message:
Bump Go to 1.25.x, update GitHub Actions dependencies, and add disk space management (#382)

* Initial plan

* Update Go to 1.25.x and update GitHub Actions versions

Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update pages.yml workflow to use actions/checkout@v4

Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update Dockerfile to use Go 1.25-bookworm and remove upx dependency

Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add Free Disk Space action to PR and push workflows

Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>

* Pin free-disk-space action to v1.3.1 for stability

Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: mudler <2420543+mudler@users.noreply.github.com>
